mapper.sql: ug.user_goal_id, ug.user_id, ug.goal_id, ug.target_min, ug.target_max, ug.target_text, ug.start_date, ug.end_date, ug.user_goal_status, ug.created_time, ug.last_change_time, hg.goal_code, hg.goal_name, hg.goal_description, hg.metric_type, hg.unit, hg.default_target_min, hg.default_target_max, hg.default_target_text, hg.sort_no AS goal_sort_no, hg.goal_status

( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_health_record hr WHERE hr.user_goal_id = ug.user_goal_id ) AS record_count, ( SELECT hr.record_value FROM t_health_record hr WHERE hr.user_goal_id = ug.user_goal_id ORDER BY hr.record_time DESC, hr.record_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_record_value, ( SELECT hr.record_text FROM t_health_record hr WHERE hr.user_goal_id = ug.user_goal_id ORDER BY hr.record_time DESC, hr.record_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_record_text, ( SELECT hr.evaluation_result FROM t_health_record hr WHERE hr.user_goal_id = ug.user_goal_id ORDER BY hr.record_time DESC, hr.record_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_evaluation_result, ( SELECT hr.record_time FROM t_health_record hr WHERE hr.user_goal_id = ug.user_goal_id ORDER BY hr.record_time DESC, hr.record_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_record_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user_health_goal ( user_id, goal_id, target_min, target_max, target_text, start_date, end_date, user_goal_status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{goalId}, #{targetMin}, #{targetMax}, #{targetText}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{userGoalStatus} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user_health_goal SET target_min = #{targetMin}, target_max = #{targetMax}, target_text = #{targetText}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, user_goal_status = #{userGoalStatus} WHERE user_goal_id = #{userGoalId}
